UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.InteractionRadius.Des: Allows players to interact by looking at any point within a radius of the specified size, rather than having to look directly at the button. Use in conjunction with the Visibility setting to make it appear as though players are interacting with other props.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.CheckStateWhenDisable: Allows to check the switch state even if disabled.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.Check State.Descripti: Check the current state of the Switch. This will then activate either On Check Result On or On Check Result Off.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Device_Switch_C.Check State.Descripti: Checks the current state of the Switch when receiving a signal from the selected channel. This will then activate If On When Checked or If Off When Checked depending on the result.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Device_Switch_C.Clear All Persistence: Clear All Persistence Data For Current Players
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.Clear All Persistence: Clear All Persistence Data For Current Players
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Device_Switch_C.Clear All Persistence: Clears saved data for all players on the island when receiving a signal from the selected channel.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.Clear All Persistence: Clears saved data for all players on the island.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.CooldownTime.Descript: Determines the cooldown time between interactions with the device.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.InitialState.Descript: Determines the initial state of the Switch if there is no saved player data to override it.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.InteractionTime.Descr: Determines the length of interaction required to toggle the switch.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.ResolveConflicts.Desc: Determines what happens when state is loaded and Store State Per Player is set to NO. FIRST PLAYER loads the oldest active player's state. MAJORITY loads the most present state with ties using the Initial State value. PRIORITIZE ON and PRIORITIZE OFF will load the state if it matches at least one player.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.Sound.Description: Determines whether a sound is played when the device changes state.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.Auto-Load.Description: Determines whether the Switch State is auto-loaded at game start, or if it needs to be loaded using events or functions.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.Auto-Save.Description: Determines whether the Switch state is saved automatically when it changes.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.AllowInteraction.Desc: Determines whether the device can be interacted.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.EnabledAtGameStart.De: Determines whether the device is enabled when the game starts. Disabled devices ignore all events except being Enabled.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.VisibleDuringGame.Des: Determines whether the device will be visible during the game.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.CheckStateAtGameStart: Determines whether the device will check its state at game start, triggering the corresponding On Check Result On or the On Check Result Off event.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.InfiniteCooldown.Desc: Determines whether the interactions have an infinite cooldown or a custom cooldown time.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.LimitTimesCanChange.D: Determines whether this device can be interacted infinitely or a custom amount of times.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.AllowedClass.Descript: Determines which Class can activate the device.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.AllowedTeam.Descripti: Determines which Team can activate the device.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.DeviceModel.Descripti: Determines which of the available models should be used for the device.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Device_Switch_C.Disable.Description: Disables the device on receiving a signal from the selected channel.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Device_Switch_C.Enable.Description: Enables the device on receiving a signal from the selected channel.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Device_Switch_C.If Off When Checked T: If Off when Checked Transmit On
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.StoreStatePerPlayer.D: If YES, each player has their own switch state. If FALSE, the switch state is the same for all players and will use the Resolve Conflict property when the state attempts to load.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Device_Switch_C.If On When Checked Tr: If on when Checked Transmit On
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Device_Switch_C.Load State.Descriptio: Loads any saved state data when receiving a signal from the selected channel.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.Save State For All.De: Saves state data for all players.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Device_Switch_C.Save State.Descriptio: Saves state data when receiving a signal from the selected channel.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.On Check Result Off.D: Sends an Event to linked devices if the Switch is OFF when the state is checked.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.On Check Result On.De: Sends an Event to linked devices if the Switch is ON when the state is checked.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.On State Changes.Desc: Sends an Event to linked devices when the Switch state is changed.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.On Turned Off.Descrip: Sends an Event to linked devices when the Switch state is set to OFF.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.On Turned On.Descript: Sends an Event to linked devices when the Switch state is set to ON.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.On State Load.Descrip: Sends an Event to linked devices when the device state is loaded.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.On State Save.Descrip: Sends an Event to linked devices when the device state is saved. This only functions when auto-save is off and Save State is activated. when Auto-Save is OFF and Save State is activated.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.On Cleared.Descriptio: Sends an Event to linked devices when the persistent data is cleared.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.Turn Off.Description: Set the Switch state to OFF.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.Turn On.Description: Set the Switch state to ON.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Device_Switch_C.Turn Off.Description: Sets the Switch state to OFF when receiving a signal from the selected channel.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Device_Switch_C.Turn On.Description: Sets the Switch state to ON when receiving a signal from the selected channel.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.TurnOffText.Descripti: Sets the interact text for turning the Switch to the off position.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.TurnOnText.Descriptio: Sets the interact text for turning the Switch to the on position.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.TimesCanChange.Descri: The number of times this device can be toggled before being disabled.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Device_Switch_C.Toggle State.Descript: Toggles the Switch state when receiving a signal from the selected channel.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Device_Switch_C.If Off When Checked T: Transmits a signal on the selected channel if the Switch is OFF when the state is checked.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Device_Switch_C.If On When Checked Tr: Transmits a signal on the selected channel if the Switch is ON when the state is checked.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Device_Switch_C.On State Changes.Desc: Transmits a signal on the selected channel when the Switch state is changed.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Device_Switch_C.On Turned Off.Descrip: Transmits a signal on the selected channel when the Switch state is set to OFF.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Device_Switch_C.On Turned On.Descript: Transmits a signal on the selected channel when the Switch state is set to ON.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Device_Switch_C.On State Save.Descrip: Transmits a signal when the device state is saved. This only functions when auto-save is off and Save State when Receiving From is activated.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.MutuallyExclusive.Des: Turning on a switch will turn off all switches with a matching Mutually Exclusive index.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.Custom Off Mesh.Descr: Uses a custom mesh instead of the switch's 'Off' State. If only one custom mesh is set, it will be used for both states.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.Custom On Mesh.Descri: Uses a custom mesh instead of the switch's 'On' State. If only one custom mesh is set, it will be used for both states.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Device_Switch_C.Clear Player Persiste: When Store State per Player is set to Yes, clears any saved data for the instigating player when receiving a signal from the selected channel.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.Clear Player Persiste: When Store State per Player is set to Yes, clears any saved data for the instigating player.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.UsePersistence.Descri: Whether or not this device should save or load any data from the backend.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.UseCustomMesh.Descrip: Whether to use a Custom Mesh rather than a preset mesh.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_Switch_V2_C.StateResetTime.Descri: Will reset the switch to the default state after this amount of time has passed.
